Authorized

Basic Information

Company Name Company Name is required Only letters, numbers, and single spaces allowed (min 2 characters) Company Name cannot exceed 200 characters
Short Name Short Name is required Only letters, numbers, spaces, and ., - are allowed (2-50 characters) Short Name cannot exceed 50 characters
Entity Type Select Company Entity @for (compEntityType of filteredCompEntityTypeList; track compEntityType.CompEntityTypeId) { {{ compEntityType.CompanyEntityTypeName }} }
Established Date calendar_today @if (companyForm.get('EstablishedDate')?.hasError('required')) { Established date is required }
Currency Select currency @for (currency of filteredCurrencyList; track currency.CurrencyId) { {{ currency.CurrencyName }} } @if (companyForm.get('CurrencyId')?.invalid && companyForm.get('CurrencyId')?.touched) { Currency is required }
Fiscal Year Start event
Parent Company Select Parent Company @for (parentComp of filteredParentCompanyList; track parentComp.ParentCompanyId) { {{ parentComp.ParentCompanyName }} } @if (companyForm.get('ParentCompanyId')?.invalid && companyForm.get('ParentCompanyId')?.touched) { Parent company is required }
Ownership Percentage Enter percentage (0-100) @if (companyForm.get('OwnershipPercentage')?.invalid && companyForm.get('OwnershipPercentage')?.touched) { Ownership Percentage is required }

Legal Information

Registered Address

Registered Address
Country Select country @for (regcountry of filteredRegisteredCountryList; track regcountry.CountryId) { {{ regcountry.CountryName }} } @if (companyForm.get('RegisteredCountryID')?.invalid && companyForm.get('RegisteredCountryID')?.touched) { Country is required }
State Select state @for (regstate of filteredRegisteredStateList; track regstate.StateId) { {{ regstate.StateName }} } @if (companyForm.get('RegisteredStateID')?.invalid && companyForm.get('RegisteredStateID')?.touched) { State is required }
District Select District @for (regdistrict of filteredRegisteredDistrictList; track regdistrict.DistrictId) { {{ regdistrict.DistrictName }} } @if (companyForm.get('RegisteredDistrictID')?.invalid && companyForm.get('RegisteredDistrictID')?.touched) { District is Required }
City Select City @for (regcity of filteredRegisteredCityList; track regcity.CityId) { {{ regcity.CityName }} } @if (companyForm.get('RegisteredCityID')?.invalid && companyForm.get('RegisteredCityID')?.touched) { City is Required }
Pin Code @if (companyForm.get('RegisteredPinCode')?.invalid && companyForm.get('RegisteredPinCode')?.touched) { Pin Code is required }

Country Select country @for (corcountry of filteredCorporateCountryList; track corcountry.CountryId) { {{ corcountry.CountryName }} } @if (companyForm.get('CorporateCountryID')?.invalid && companyForm.get('CorporateCountryID')?.touched) { Country is required }
State Select State @for (corState of filteredCorporateStateList; track corState.StateId) { {{ corState.StateName }} } @if (companyForm.get('CorporateStateID')?.invalid && companyForm.get('CorporateStateID')?.touched) { State is required }
